title: Boundary-coverage gaps (analysis phase)
description: Top-level boundary_gaps array emitted by the in-session analysis alongside behaviors. Each element is an uncovered boundary condition implied by the source. Strict: a present-but-malformed payload fails ingest (exit 6); an absent key is treated as no gaps.

field.description: The parameter/field or behavior the boundary concerns (e.g. 'username', 'order total').

kind.description: Boundary kind. Expected vocabulary (not enforced as an enum): min-max, off-by-one, empty-null, overflow, timeout, max-length.

description.description: Short description of the missing edge (e.g. '21-char input (max 20) is untested').

source.description: Document/criterion that implies the boundary. Optional; empty string is valid (model may infer from combined context).
